summary: The diff modifies PaymentSection.tsx and supporting files. The UPI ID update to 'luminiagadgets@okicici' appears to be present in PaymentSection.tsx (though truncated), and the two-step payment flow logic is preserved. However, the actual binary replacement of the QR code image file (frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png) is not shown in the diff — no image file was added or modified according to the diff summary ('Added: 0, Modified: 3, Removed: 0'). The three modified files are PaymentSection.tsx, frontend-file-summaries.txt, and project_state.json — none of which is the image asset itself.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the file at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png with the content of image-9.png (the new Luminia Gadgets Google Pay QR code).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary explicitly states 'Added: 0, Modified: 3, Removed: 0' and none of the 3 modified files is the QR image asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png. The image replacement is not reflected anywhere in the diff.
